title: Sagar Fiesta 2026
description: Sagar Fiesta 2026 is a vibrant techno-cultural extravaganza at SISTec Gandhi Nagar, Bhopal. A celebration of innovation, talent, and creativity.
longDescription:
Sagar Fiesta 2026 is a vibrant techno-cultural extravaganza organized by Sagar Institute of Science and Technology, Gandhi Nagar, Bhopal, bringing together the perfect fusion of technology, creativity, art, and entertainment.

More than just a fest, Sagar Fiesta is a celebration of ideas, innovation, and youthful energy. It creates an electrifying atmosphere filled with lights, music, technology, and creativity, where students from diverse backgrounds and disciplines unite to learn, collaborate, innovate, and showcase their talents.

Scheduled to be held from 3rd – 5th April 2026, Sagar Fiesta will host a dynamic lineup of technical competitions, cultural performances, workshops, and art exhibitions. These events provide a powerful platform for students from different colleges to demonstrate their skills, express their creativity, and connect with like-minded innovators and artists.

The fest aims to inspire young minds to think beyond the classroom, explore new possibilities, and transform ideas into reality, while celebrating the spirit of creativity, technology, and collaboration.

Sagar Fiesta 2026 – Where Innovation Meets Celebration.

faq.a: All engineering and management students can participate.
Yes, online registration is required for all events.

title: Samadhaan Hackathon
description: 24-hour hackathon to solve real-world problems. Build, innovate, and win big!
longDescription: Samadhaan is a platform for young minds to tackle challenges in healthcare, agriculture, and urban development using technology. Join teams, brainstorm, and build prototypes within 24 hours.

faq.a: Yes, we encourage both software and hardware solutions.

title: Sagar Roadies
description: The ultimate test of guts, glory, and endurance in this high-energy adventure challenge.
longDescription:
Sagar Roadies is not for the faint-hearted. It's a series of physical and mental challenges designed to test your resilience, teamwork, and decision-making under pressure. Join the journey to find the ultimate Roadie of SISTec.

Theme: ROOT TO RISE - Honour your Roots, Rise towards Future.
National Level Techno-Cultural Fest.

faq.a: Comfortable sports attire and sturdy shoes are mandatory.
Participants must be current college students.

title: Adhaar Quiz League
description: Test your knowledge across science, tech, and current affairs in this mega quiz.
longDescription: Adhaar Quiz League is designed to challenge your intellect and memory. Compete against the brightest minds and dive deep into the world of facts.

faq.a: No, entry is free for all SISTec students.

title: Code Rush: Competitive Programming
description: Show off your algorithm and problem-solving skills in this high-intensity coding duel.
longDescription: Code Rush is the ultimate test of speed and logic. Participants will solve complex algorithmic problems within a limited timeframe. Rank high to win prizes and prestige.

faq.a: C++, Java, Python, and JavaScript are supported.

title: Robo-Wars
description: Witness the clash of metal and innovation in the most-awaited robotics battle.
longDescription: Robo-Wars brings together engineering brilliance and combat strategy. Build a robust robot to push your opponents out of the arena or incapacitate them.

title: Design-A-Thon
description: Create intuitive and beautiful user experiences for real-world application challenges.
longDescription: Focus on the user journey and visual storytelling. Design-A-Thon challenges designers to solve workflow problems through wireframes and high-fidelity prototypes.

title: SISTec Voice: Solo Singing
description: Find the voice of the year in this melodic competition.
longDescription: Singing Star is a platform for solo vocalists to showcase their musical range. From classical to contemporary, all genres are welcome.

title: IoT Expo
description: Showcase connected solutions that can transform everyday living.
longDescription: The IoT Expo is a gathering for hardware enthusiasts. Present your smart home, industrial automation, or agricultural monitoring projects.

faq.a: Yes, basic AC power is provided at each booth.

title: Valorant Championship
description: Battle out in the tactical shooter tournament to claim the top spot.
longDescription: Join the high-stakes E-sports arena. 5v5 tactical shooter tournament. May the best team with the best strategy win.

faq.a: You are encouraged to bring your own peripherals.

title: Lens Master: Photography
description: Capture the essence of the fest through your lens.
longDescription: A themed photography competition. Capture moments, emotions, and the spirit of Sagar Fiesta within the campus.

faq.a: Yes, there is a separate category for mobile photography.

title: War of Words: Debate
description: Engage in intellectual battles on modern technical and ethical topics.
longDescription: Express your views and challenge opinions in a structured debate format. Topics will cover AI ethics, future of engineering, and social change.

title: Bridge-It: Structural Contest
description: Design bridges with popsicle sticks that can withstand maximum load.
longDescription: Test your civil engineering skills. Construct a bridge using provided materials and see it face the ultimate load-bearing test.

faq.a: Yes, popsicle sticks and glue will be provided.

title: Pitch Perfect: Startups
description: Present your business ideas to a panel of entrepreneurs and investors.
longDescription: The ultimate platform for budding entrepreneurs. Pitch your business model, target market, and scalability plan.

faq.a: It's not mandatory but highly recommended for better scoring.

title: Rhythm Rush: Beatboxing
description: Showcase your vocal percussion skills in this energetic battle.
longDescription: Compete against other beatboxers in a multi-round elimination tournament. Show your technicality, musicality, and stage presence.

faq.a: Yes, high-quality dynamic mics will be provided.

title: Mega Treasure Hunt
description: Solve riddles and explore the campus to find the ultimate treasure.
longDescription: The most exciting event of the fest! Teams will solve cryptic clues that lead them to various locations across the campus.
